Localization.Description: Operations with a floating IP address

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} could not link a floating IP address with an internal port on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} deleted a floating IP address on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} linked a floating IP address {object.value} with an internal port on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not create a floating IP address on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} created floating IP address {object.value} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} unlinked an internal port from floating IP address {object.value} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not delete a floating IP address on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not unlink an internal port from floating IP address {object.value} on host {event_src.host}
